result.name: Drink me
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Liquid inside a glass bottle with a paper label that says “DRINK ME” Effect: Causes the imbiber to shrink down to half their size. The effect lasts for one hour or until the user can find another way to change their size (such as with an eat me).

sections.name: Drink me
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6

Form: Liquid inside a glass bottle with a paper label that says “DRINK ME”

Effect: Causes the imbiber to shrink down to half their size. The effect lasts for one hour or until the user can find another way to change their size (such as with an eat me).
